projects.title: Heyjom Platform
projects.description: White-label sports & fitness registration platform serving 800K+ active users. Architected configurable multi-tenant Next.js apps under a feature-based structure — spinning up branded campaign sites from a single shared codebase. Drove +224% YoY user growth and a 57% engagement rate.

projects.title: PCARI
projects.description: In-house product (pcari.my + admin dashboard). Built core web features with Next.js and TypeScript, focused on performance and responsiveness, working closely with UI/UX designers and backend engineers.

projects.title: Government Web Platform
projects.description: Confidential government project. Led the initialization and front-end architecture of a secure web application — establishing the framework foundation and component structure, and coordinating with backend developers and stakeholders to deliver an integrated full-stack solution.
